title: COPT Defense (CDP) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
author: Zacks.Com
description: COPT Defense reported revenue of $187.34 million, up 10.7% year-over-year, and EPS of $0.64 in Q2 2024. The company's revenue beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate, while EPS met expectations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company reported strong revenue growth and met EPS expectations, indicating a positive performance in the quarter.

title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does COPT Defense (CDP) have what it takes? Let's find out.

title: 3 Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks: A Smarter Way to Boost Your Retirement Income

description: The traditional retirement planning approaches no longer cover all expenses in nest egg years. So what can retirees do? Thankfully, there are alternative investments that provide steady, higher-rate income streams to replace dwindling bond yields.
